checks.detail: Primary question 'What exactly am I going to build and why should I care?' is not clearly answered - lesson shows pipeline concepts but doesn't explain what the specific app does
what_gets_built describes 'complete demo of finished app with all panels working together' but challenge only implements basic tokenization function
Test suite is incomplete - test_punctuation_and_spacing function cuts off mid-assertion

blocking_issues: Primary question from lesson plan not answered - learners won't understand what specific app they're building
Challenge doesn't match what_gets_built scope - tokenization function vs complete 4-panel demo
Test suite has broken/incomplete test case that will cause syntax errors
auto_fixable: Add explanation of what the specific 4-panel app does and why it's valuable
Clarify relationship between simple tokenization challenge and complete demo scope
